calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-31-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Susan Lee. There being no appearance by Plaintiff, Arnold Chin or Defendant, Monica Laurie Higginbothan, the Court ordered the matter off calendar and the trial date is vacated.
